text:
Created attachment 177569
Proposed patch (since 425939 revision)

Patch to update games/pioneer port from 20161110 to 20161129 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/compare/20161110...20161129

- Remove localbase from USES, because related issue was fixed

The build was tested on FreeBSD 9.3 and 10.2 amd64.
